message:
Add proptest dev-dependency, update Cargo.lock, and pin nightly toolchain

Cargo.toml: Add proptest v1 as a dev-dependency for property-based
testing. This enables randomized test case generation to improve test
coverage and catch edge cases in the CMA-ES optimization algorithm.

Cargo.lock: Updated to include proptest and all its transitive
dependencies (anyhow, bit-set, bit-vec, bitflags, equivalent, errno,
fastrand, and many more). Also reflects the new proptest entry in the
cmaes crate's dev-dependencies.

rust-toolchain.toml: Pin to nightly channel with rustfmt and clippy
components for consistent toolchain across environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
